description_long: This object is a rectangular glass display case with a sturdy base, commonly used for showcasing jewelry in urban retail environments. The upper section is enclosed with transparent glass panels, allowing clear visibility of the items inside while providing protection. The interior is divided into several compartments, each lined with a red, grid-patterned surface to organize and highlight individual jewelry pieces. The base is solid, finished in a neutral gray with a dark brown trim at the bottom, giving it a professional and secure appearance. The overall design is functional and elegant, suitable for high-traffic areas such as jewelry stores or market stalls. The case is designed to be both visually appealing and secure, emphasizing the value and delicacy of the items displayed within.
description: A rectangular glass jewelry display case with a solid gray and brown base, featuring red-lined compartments for showcasing items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass display case, with visible red-lined compartments and a solid base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the case and the glass enclosure, with the brown trim at the bottom clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the glass enclosure and compartment layout from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and the protective glass panels.
